overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring wet reflective pavement, towering glass buildings with digital billboards, and cylindrical neon advertising pillars. The scene transitions from an open plaza with scattered pedestrians to a covered walkway lined with palm trees, all rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with dominant cyan and magenta neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic pedestrian promenade with neon advertising pillars

events.description: slight turn to the left toward the central plaza area
entering the open plaza from the side walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the right side of a neon-lit promenade, approaching a central plaza with glowing cylindrical pillars and wet reflective pavement

entered.detail: tall cylindrical pillar with rotating digital advertisements and cyan neon base lighting
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows and large digital billboards
large flat screen displaying colorful advertisements on building facade
continuous cyan LED strip lighting along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city walkway at night, with the camera moving forward along wet pavement reflecting cyan neon lights. Tall cylindrical advertising pillars with digital displays line the left side, while glass office towers rise in the distance. The scene transitions from the narrow walkway into a more open plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with circular seating areas and holographic advertising pillars

events.description: passing by pedestrians sitting on illuminated circular benches
turning right to navigate around the central plaza planters

agents.ego_description: navigating through the central plaza, passing people sitting on illuminated benches and observing the surrounding neon advertisements on pillars

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket and red pants sitting on a bench
group of pedestrians walking through the plaza center

entered.detail: raised square planter with bushes and integrated white bench seating with neon edging
large metal gantry structure spanning across the plaza with attached lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the central plaza, revealing circular planters with people sitting on illuminated benches. The overhead gantry structure becomes visible against the night sky, while cylindrical advertising pillars display rotating digital content. Pedestrians are scattered throughout, some seated and others walking through the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza transitioning to covered walkway with palm tree landscaping

events.description: moving from open plaza toward the covered walkway section
palm trees become visible along the path edges

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward a covered section, passing individual pedestrians and observing the overhead structure and building facades

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket standing near the building wall

entered.detail: tropical palm trees in planters lining the walkway approach
dark modern building wall with small illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the plaza, turning right toward a more enclosed area. Palm trees appear in planters along the path, and the overhead structure moves closer. The background skyscrapers fade slightly as the camera approaches the covered walkway entrance, with building facades now visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with overhead neon lighting and palm trees

events.description: entering covered area with overhead neon strip lighting creating tunnel effect
slight adjustment toward the bright exit archway ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered neon-lit corridor lined with palm trees, approaching a brightly lit exit archway with other pedestrians visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking toward the camera
person walking alongside the building wall

entered.detail: solid overhead roof structure with geometric cutouts revealing the night sky
continuous cyan LED light strips running along the ceiling of the covered walkway
illuminated exit portal with warm yellow lighting at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a covered walkway with a solid roof overhead featuring geometric cutouts. Neon light strips illuminate the ceiling, and palm trees line both sides of the path. The camera approaches a brightly lit exit archway at the corridor's end, while pedestrians walk toward and alongside the camera in the enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city walkway that gradually opens into a wide, illuminated public plaza. It begins by gliding forward along wet pavement reflecting vibrant cyan neon lights, passing a row of tall cylindrical advertising pillars and distant glass office towers. As the camera advances, the narrow path expands into a central plaza, shifting the perspective from a linear corridor to an open urban space. The scene then reveals circular planters and pedestrians resting on illuminated benches, while a massive overhead gantry structure emerges against the night sky. Finally, the view broadens to encompass the full scale of the plaza, with rotating digital content on the pillars casting a glow over the scattered crowds.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open cyberpunk plaza into a structured, neon-lit covered walkway. It begins by turning right away from the towering skyscrapers toward a more enclosed area, where palm trees in planters first appear along the path. As the camera approaches the entrance of the walkway, the distant city facades fade and the overhead structure descends to frame the view. The scene then shifts fully into the corridor, moving beneath a solid roof with geometric cutouts and glowing neon light strips that illuminate the ceiling. Finally, the camera glides past pedestrians lining the path, moving steadily toward a brightly lit exit archway at the end of the corridor.
